verdict: Pure-Python BPE trained on 1 book only (full corpus infeasible); worst fertility/utilization of the 5 candidates; validates the from-scratch implementation, not a real candidate.
Fertility 1.612 tok/word on held-out books, 87.7% vocab utilization; smallest embedding table but noticeably worse fertility/rare-word splitting than 16k; not chosen.
Fertility 1.500 tok/word on held-out books, 71.3% vocab utilization, 3.80 avg pieces/rare-word; best balance of fertility/rare-word gains vs embedding-table cost; CHOSEN as project tokenizer (D-014).
Fertility 1.427 tok/word on held-out books but only 49.3% vocab utilization and up to 49% of a 100M param budget in the embedding table; diminishing returns over 16k; not chosen.
OpenAI's tokenizer, never trained on our corpus; only 30.6% vocab utilization on our held-out text despite 50k vocab, confirming domain mismatch; reference only, not a candidate.

Worst of the 3 at every checkpoint (not unstable, just slow -- lower lr covers less ground in 300 steps).
WINNER -- strictly ahead of lo/hi at every logged checkpoint, not just at the end; confirms D-021's lr=1e-3 default (D-025).
Worse than mid but no divergence (grad_clip=1.0 bounds the damage, not the outcome -- mean grad_norm even lower than mid's, yet loss is worse).

THE S-tier reference run. val_loss 9.55->3.50 over 98.3M tokens, textbook power-law flattening; samples pick up the corpus's Socratic-dialogue register by step 800. lr=1e-3 ratified by the sweep above (D-025).

Seed-noise study 2/3 (RTX 5090). val_loss within 0.007 of baseline's 3.5037 at every logged eval step -- confirms training is reproducible-within-noise, not seed-sensitive.

Seed-noise study 3/3 (RTX 5090). Sets the noise floor with seeds 1337/1338: mean val_loss 3.5043, std 0.0062, spread (max-min) 0.0150 -- any Wave A-G ablation delta smaller than ~0.015 is not distinguishable from seed noise (D-035, logged in EXPERIMENTS.md).

BORDERLINE. Consistently ~0.015-0.027 better than baseline at every checkpoint, closing to exactly -0.0158 at the end -- right at the 0.015 noise floor (D-035). Real but marginal at S-tier/this token budget; not strong enough alone to override RMSNorm's compute-cost edge.

NEGATIVE RESULT (as predicted by the spec). Not a divergent blowup (grad_norm stayed <=1.52, under grad_clip) -- instead the 15-layer post-norm model stagnates near loss~6.8 by step ~150 and never recovers; samples are punctuation/word-fragment soup. Confirms pre-norm's necessity for stable training at this depth without extra warmup care.

variable_changed: ffn=gelu, ffn_mult=4.0 (vs baseline's swiglu, ffn_mult=8/3) -- param-matched
verdict: REAL, ROBUST. Consistently ~0.15-0.2 WORSE than SwiGLU at matched param count from step 200 onward, not just at the end -- well beyond the 0.015 noise floor. Confirms SwiGLU's reported advantage over plain GELU MLPs at equal params.

REAL, ROBUST, BEST OF WAVE A. Consistently 0.03-0.064 better than baseline at every checkpoint, gap widening over training to -0.0622 at the end -- clearly beyond the 0.015 noise floor. QK-norm is a clean win even at S-tier/shallow depth.

REAL, WORSE. +0.227 val_loss vs RoPE at equal steps -- absolute position embeddings train slower than RoPE at this scale. Cannot extrapolate past max_seq_len=512 by construction (fixed-size table) -- see length-extrapolation probe in notes.md.

REAL, WORST OF WAVE B by a wide margin. +1.486 val_loss vs RoPE -- notably worse than even learned absolute embeddings, a genuine surprise. Fixed (non-learned) sin/cos table appears to be the hardest signal for this small/shallow model to exploit. Also cannot extrapolate past 512 by construction.

REAL, BEST OF WAVE B. -0.0207 val_loss vs RoPE at trained length (just past the 0.015 noise floor), consistently ahead from early training onward. Length-extrapolation probe (512/1024/2048): val_loss IMPROVES with more context (3.4830->3.4683->3.4552) -- textbook ALiBi behavior, reproduces the paper's headline claim at this tiny scale.

REAL, WORSE at trained length (+0.196) AND catastrophic under extrapolation: val_loss 3.70->4.21->6.60 (ppl 40->67->732) at seq_len 512->1024->2048 -- confirms NoPE has zero mechanism for handling positions beyond what causal masking alone implies, the sharpest contrast in the whole length-extrapolation probe.
